description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a prominent black hip roof and a detached garage connected by a breezeway. The front facade features a covered entryway with columns, a small porch, and symmetrical windows. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a paved driveway, landscaped garden beds, and several trees and shrubs. The backyard contains a patio area with outdoor furniture and a hot tub, as well as additional green space. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on the front and rear, while the sides have fewer openings. The overall design blends traditional and suburban architectural elements, creating a comfortable residential appearance.
description: A two-story brick house with a black hip roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and symmetrical window arrangement. Features include a covered entryway, patio, and hot tub in the backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, porch, and attached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall with minimal windows, garden beds, and a clear view of the front walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, hot tub, and large windows overlooking the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, small porch, single front door, and minimal decorative elements
